prompt: Make the bass line feel more alive by varying the velocity between notes — harder on the downbeats, softer off-beats.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4

sec verse
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36
    v 110 95

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 48 52 55

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

sec chorus
  ch 1 Melody
    p q q q q
    n 65 67 69 72

  ch 2 Bass
    p q q _q q
    n 36
    v 115 90 90

  ch 3 Chords
    p w w
    n 53 57 60

  ch 4 Kick
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

  ch 5 Snare
    p _q q _q q
    n 38

  ch 6 HiHat
    p x x x x x x x x
    n 42

validationResult.error: Line 32: Alignment error — 'v' has 2 values but pattern has 4

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly used the 'v' directive to apply higher velocity to the downbeat (beat 1) and lower velocity to the subsequent notes in the pattern.
judgment.quality_reason: The velocity values chosen (e.g., 115 vs 90) provide a clear and musical strong/weak rhythmic feel that effectively humanizes the bass line.
